name: physics-research
description: Subject-agnostic physics research workflow: read / explore / production modes, rigorous derivation & verification, PRL figures, phased git, adversarial review.

interface.shortDescription: Read / explore / production research workflow for physics.
interface.longDescription: Four research modes (literature-reading notes, cheap traceable exploration, a trustworthy 6-stage production pipeline, and two-level review: self-review then adversarial audit) plus derivation, verification, figure, and git discipline. Subject-agnostic core; pair with a domain pack.
defaultPrompt: Help me read this paper and take rigorous notes.
I need to compute this result for a paper — it must be correct.
